feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: bharats-claude-toolkit
entry.content: Bharat's personal Claude Code setup, packaged as a plugin + marketplace: 116 vendored skills and 4 agents spanning engineering, AI, product, design, copy/UX, go-to-market, marketing, and enterprise & ops, plus a curated always-on plugin tier and an on-demand firehose one command away.

entry.title: planr-pipeline
entry.content: Spec-driven AI software factory for Claude Code. Two-phase pipeline (PO → review → DEV) with an optional design-generation step, specialized subagents, stack-aware code generation, and hard rules enforced at the tool layer.

entry.title: harness-kit
entry.content: A suite of expert AI agents and skills implementing Harness Engineering — autonomous TDD/DDD orchestration, phase-isolated agents, adversarial QA, critical code review, and persistent project memory for disciplined, high-quality software engineering workflows.

entry.title: workflow
entry.content: Development workflow automation skills

entry.title: voicemode
entry.content: Voice conversations with Claude Code using local speech-to-text and text-to-speech

entry.title: pulse-skills
entry.content: Public JoomPulse agent skills for product research and marketplace workflows.

entry.title: pika
entry.content: Pika Creative Suite — give any AI agent a face, a voice, and a full creative studio. 9 curated /pika:* skills backed by 58 atomic media tools at mcp.pika.me.

entry.title: foldkit-skills
entry.content: Skills for building Foldkit apps — app generator, message scaffolding, submodel extraction, and architecture auditing

entry.title: design-system-ops-internal
entry.content: Staff-level design-system operations for the Quadrivia frontend — audit, govern, document, validate, and communicate. Evidence-based findings, label-based (never numeric) output, instructions-only with no code execution or data egress.

entry.title: ai-devkit
entry.content: Make AI coding agents follow a repeatable engineering workflow with memory, verification, skills, and multi-agent setup

entry.title: discord
entry.content: Discord channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

entry.title: apple-photos
entry.content: Query and export from the macOS Apple Photos library via osxphotos - search by date/album/keyword/person, list albums and folders, fetch metadata, and export originals or edited photos (macOS only)

entry.title: affiliate-networks-mcp
entry.content: Chat with your affiliate-network data in Claude through a local MCP server. 80+ publisher and advertiser-side adapters across the US, EU, Nordics, APAC and LatAm, most experimental.

entry.title: claude-apd
entry.content: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines with mechanical guardrails

entry.title: onesource
entry.content: 30 tools for live blockchain queries via x402 micropayments

entry.title: punchcard
entry.content: Drive AI coding agents through a punchcard board: a PM files tasks, an Engineer ships them as reviewed PRs with proof of work.

entry.title: edmunds-claude-code
entry.content: Edmund's personal Claude Code setup with 14 productivity commands and 11 specialized AI agents for modern web development

entry.title: claude-code-memory
entry.content: Claude Codeの記憶を外部DBに保存し、セッション間で知識・決定事項・アクティビティを永続化する

entry.title: probity
entry.content: Process discipline for AI coding agents — TDD enforcement and policies.

entry.title: trendvane
entry.content: daily trend research and content brief generator for creators. fetches from hackernews, reddit, tiktok, youtube, product hunt, and google trends, scores by niche fit, and drops 3 shootable video briefs into notion every morning. on first run it guides you through full setup.

entry.title: hands-on-deck
entry.content: Agent-native PowerPoint manipulation. One CLI (deck.py) lets agents inspect, edit, create, and verify .pptx files through atomic JSON patches — with self-correcting errors, deterministic geometry repair, and built-in visual verification.

entry.title: reviewable-html-workbench
entry.content: Generate reviewable HTML documents, serve previews, collect comments, and feed review outcomes back into agent workflows.

entry.title: food-planner
entry.content: Weekly meal planning automation: Cookidoo recipe + meal-plan + shopping-list orchestration with German supermarket offer integration (Marktguru)

entry.title: citevahti
entry.content: CiteVahti — citation integrity for manuscripts. Human-first blinded claim verification with PubMed, decision-gated Zotero write-back, and a hash-chained audit trail; plus an AI-assisted drafting skill that writes only from verified claims.

entry.title: recoup-skills
entry.content: A record label in a box. Recoup turns your AI agent into a full music team — artist research and analytics, content and short-form video, song analysis, release campaigns, and catalog valuation — all in one install.

entry.title: transcend-harness
entry.content: Meta-framework: interview a project and generate a bespoke, committed .claude/ harness (architecture, testing, context/handoff, git, review, specialized workflows). Includes an audit mode to critique and improve an existing harness.

entry.title: storyforge
entry.content: AI-powered book writing pipeline: brainstorm, concept, plot, characters, chapters, export

entry.title: aura
entry.content: Aura protocol — 12-phase audit-trail workflow for structured software development with agent coordination, beads task tracking, and vertical slice implementation

entry.title: arboretum
entry.content: Choreography for AI-assisted software development. Defers heavy lifting to specialists like superpowers; provides governance, workflows, and templates that produce maintainable projects.

entry.title: agent-team
entry.content: Multi-session agent team for Claude Code: filesystem task queue, tmux worker dispatch, automated review cycle, optional Trello board sync.

entry.title: servicenow-mcp-ai
entry.content: Drive ServiceNow from your AI assistant — 67 tools over the full REST surface, with plan-and-apply write safety, capability preflight and an ACL security scan.

entry.title: carbone-skill
entry.content: Official Carbone skill — complete templating language reference covering tags, loops, conditions, formatters, aggregators, and all output formats (DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, HTML, Markdown, PDF)

entry.title: t3
entry.content: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entry.title: grounding-attribution
entry.content: Source-attribution injection + mechanical grounding verification. Makes Claude Code cite machine-checkable artifacts (file:line, tool calls) and verifies those citations against the current filesystem; warn-only by default.

entry.title: azure
entry.content: Microsoft Azure MCP and Skills integration for cloud resource management, deployments, and Azure services. Manage your Azure infrastructure, monitor applications, and deploy resources directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: spanner-readonly-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Google Cloud Spanner MCP server. Exposes SELECT-only query execution and schema introspection (list_tables, describe_table, list_indexes, execute_query). Write operations are blocked by both a forbidden-keyword regex and a Spanner read-only snapshot.

entry.title: hmd
entry.content: Nothing ships unproven. Heimdall is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code that turns one prompt into a finished project — and keeps moving the bar on what counts as done: every plan wires an external, falsifiable oracle so the implementation can never grade its own homework, and the merge stays blocked until the work is proven correct. Decomposes work, spawns parallel agents, enforces quality gates with CTO-level judgment. Live observability via a terminal-native HUD statusline and end-of-run summary card.

entry.title: auto-claude-skills
entry.content: Enables agentic PDLC in Claude Code with phase-aware skill routing, guardrails, and workflow state recovery

entry.title: tokenplan-usage-hud
entry.content: Provider-agnostic Claude Code statusline plugin for token-plan usage and account balance. Picks the provider from ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (currently MiniMax + DeepSeek); hides itself otherwise. Renders a dim ' · Xm ago' annotation when displaying cached data after a fetch failure, or 'Usage:/Balance: not available!' when no cached data exists. Composes with another statusline via the TOKENPLAN_UPSTREAM_CMD env var.

entry.title: crw
entry.content: Scrape, crawl, map, search, parse, extract, and change-track the web with fastCRW — the open-source, self-hostable Firecrawl alternative. Single Rust binary, ~6 MB RAM, Firecrawl-compatible /v1 + /v2 API, bundled SearXNG search.

entry.title: beads-superpowers
entry.content: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 7 more AI coding agents. 22 skills + persistent task memory.

entry.title: pkgq
entry.content: Package Query - Find, create, and update package documentation for AI agents

entry.title: atlas
entry.content: Turn a stated need into a full system design by mining the Atlas knowledge graph.

entry.title: openquok
entry.content: Openquok CLI skill for the social media scheduling API — integrations, posts, uploads, analytics (JSON output for agents).

entry.title: sq
entry.content: Agent skill for the sq CLI: SLQ and native SQL, sources and handles, output formats, inspect/diff/tbl, and per-driver notes for databases and file formats.

entry.title: rig
entry.content: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: marketing-pipeline
entry.content: Automated distribution pipeline for open source developer tools. Onboard a project from its README, launch to MCP Registry + directories, post to Bluesky/Dev.to/Hashnode/Mastodon, track engagement.

entry.title: bork
entry.content: My Original and Collected skills, agents, commands, and hooks. Writing, reviewing, planning, QA, and shipping across the dev cycle.

entry.title: workbench-bujo
entry.content: BuJo ritual system: daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly interactive reflections in Apple Notes. Scheduled rituals with on-demand slash commands.

entry.title: cybersecurity-skills
entry.content: 817 cybersecurity skills covering web security, pentesting, DFIR, threat intelligence, cloud security, malware analysis, and more.

entry.title: quality-strategy
entry.content: Produce and use a software quality strategy — who matters, what they value, where you're exposed, and what to do about it — plus the test and tooling strategies that operationalise it, and shareable visual artefacts generated from it. Grounded in Edmund Pringle's quality framework.

entry.title: mtrojer
entry.content: Personal Claude Code plugin: agent-attention tmux integration and the shared dotfiles skills suite (commit, brainstorm, plan, council, caveman, summarize, tmux, and friends).

entry.title: cc-native
entry.content: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entry.title: screenshotter
entry.content: Capture full-page screenshots and an extracted typography.md of any website, bundled into a zip.

entry.title: ru-text
entry.content: Russian text quality plugin — typography, information style, editorial standards, UX writing, business correspondence

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: pr-review
entry.content: Multi-persona PR review pipeline, ralph loop planning, and code review skills.

entry.title: canary
entry.content: AI-powered test generation for Claude Code — generate, init, and migrate test suites via slash commands.

entry.title: snapshot
entry.content: Session snapshot capture and restore system for Claude Code sessions. Captures terminal state, git context, test results, pending questions, and recent errors to enable seamless context restoration across compactions and multi-terminal workflows.

entry.title: kronael
entry.content: Installer for the Kronael toolkit. Trigger by saying 'install kronael', 'install kronael tools', or running /kronael:install. Deploys language patterns (go/py/rs/ts/sql), workflow commands (commit, ship, refine, diary), wisdom skill, and lifecycle hooks (compaction preservation, prompt nudges, stop checks) into ~/.claude/.

entry.title: cyberpunk-hud
entry.content: Neon, animated, customizable status line for Claude Code with live 5-hour & weekly usage gauges, themes, and per-element visibility.

entry.title: claude-agent-team
entry.content: 在隔离 git worktree 内、走 TDD、通过共享看板协作的五角色 Agent Team（Planner/Coder/Tester/Reviewer/Doc Writer）；复杂任务先用 superpowers brainstorming 确认需求，带覆盖闸门、迭代修复闭环、终局复跑、update-docs 同源文档完善与自动提交。

entry.title: h6s-data
entry.content: 한국 금융기관(은행/홈택스/법인카드) 데이터 수집 — 입출금내역·세금계산서·현금영수증·법인카드

entry.title: voice-control
entry.content: Phone voice remote for your interactive Claude Code session — types your speech into the cmux pane and speaks replies back.

entry.title: modjo-sales-agent
entry.content: The Modjo Sales Agent — your Modjo data, automated. 20 skills covering the rep's daily rhythm, per-deal execution, portfolio view, coaching, and post-sale. Plug into your Modjo workspace; Notion optional for persistence; Gmail optional for drafting follow-ups in your voice; CSV paste-in onramp if you're not on Modjo yet.

entry.title: y2
entry.content: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entry.title: merit-aktiva-workspace
entry.content: Merit Aktiva accounting + Merit Palk payroll for Claude Code — full API coverage via the elnora-merit CLI, plus how-to skills for the correct Merit procedure: accounting (sales/purchase invoices, payments/bank reconciliation, VAT/KMD, reports, reverse charge) and payroll (employees & contracts, monthly salaries/withholdings/absences, salary & GL reports, per-employee settings), agents, and slash commands.

entry.title: frontend-skills
entry.content: React/TypeScript frontend + Go backend enforcement harness. 92 wired hooks across 101 scripts enforce patterns on every edit. Green != done: `test-warning-check` surfaces warnings on passing test/lint/type runs (DeprecationWarning, React `act()`, unhandled rejection, `@ts-ignore`); `ci-warning-audit` Stop-hook scans `gh run view --log` on green CI for deprecations / console warnings / skipped tests. 71 skills from TDD through CI-green PR, including /steelman anti-sycophancy guard + /snyk-ux-security per-path vuln sweep (JS + Go ecosystems; exploitability-triage first gate via `bun why`/`go mod why`/`govulncheck`; top-level direct dep bump first, parent dep bump second, resolutions/overrides/replace as last resort only with follow-up TODO to remove; React 18 pin + changelog-walked major bumps + no-deferral escalation; Go `snyk test --file=go.mod` + `go get -u` + `go mod tidy` + `govulncheck` verify). Session exit blocked while PR review threads remain unresolved. TypeScript escape hatches blocked at Edit. tsconfig strictness weakening blocked. Worktree isolation + branch safety hook-enforced. bun.lock + yarn.lock parity enforced (Snyk IO doesn't parse bun.lock). 21 LLM failure modes enforced: 7 Karpathy single-agent + 14 MAST multi-agent (Cemri et al. NeurIPS 2025). OWASP + STRIDE subset + snyk/bun audit. Core Web Vitals perf gate. MCP ban with CLI redirect (~20x token savings). Agent-browser wrap (~91% token reduction for AI browsing). 3-hat plan review (product/engineering/design). 9 agents (adds plan hats + karpathy reference), 5 routines. Opus 4.7 tuned, POSIX-friendly.

entry.title: deliberation
entry.content: Use when you want a delegated second opinion or implementation from GPT (Codex), Gemini, Grok (xAI), or OpenRouter (config-driven, 400+ models) - seven expert subagents (Architect, Plan Reviewer, Scope Analyst, Code Reviewer, Security Analyst, Researcher, Debugger) and bundled ask-gpt/ask-gemini/ask-grok/ask-openrouter/ask-all/consensus commands, advisory (read-only) or implementation (write; Grok and OpenRouter are advisory-only).

entry.title: roundtable
entry.content: Multi-agent adversarial review panel — 4-6 AI reviewers debate your code/plans, then a judge delivers a structured verdict with epistemic labels. Bundles plan-review-integrator for applying review findings back into implementation plans.

entry.title: cc-safe-setup
entry.content: 734 safety hooks for Claude Code — prevent file deletion, credential leaks, git disasters, and token waste during autonomous AI coding sessions

entry.title: claude-copilot
entry.content: Claude Copilot — a framework of specialized agents, skills, commands, and hooks that give Claude persistent memory, expert methodology, and task tracking. Agents cover architecture (ta), engineering (me), QA (qa), service design (sd), DevOps (do), documentation (doc), and knowledge onboarding (kc).

entry.title: alien-agent-id
entry.content: A portable cryptographic identity, encrypted credential vault, and logged-in browser for AI agents. The agent uses your credentials by name without ever seeing them, signs its git commits, and drives sites you're logged into. Works standalone; optionally link the identity to a verified human via Alien Network biometric SSO.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: cc-skills-sdlc
entry.content: SDLC skills for Claude Code — architecture, planning, code quality, testing, review, and documentation.

entry.title: ospec-workflow
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development workflow for VS Code Agent Customization with OpenSpec, strict TDD, phase agents, skills, hooks, and verification contracts.

entry.title: flockion
entry.content: Lazy senior engineer skills: write the least code that safely solves the real problem. Ships the engineering ladder plus product, architecture, agent, review, security, and cost skills.

entry.title: nexus-agents
entry.content: Intelligent orchestration platform for AI coding tools — routes tasks to the best model, learns from outcomes, and enforces quality through multi-model consensus. 46 MCP tools for agent management, research, memory, consensus voting, codebase intelligence, and a full dev pipeline.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Domain-specific skills and agents for Odoo development, code review, and more

entry.title: numeric-mcp-toolkit
entry.content: AI skills for the Numeric MCP — close pulse, close retro, close checklist diagnostic, flux drafting, accruals, journal entries, rec workbooks, rec-assignment imports, department anomaly scanning, cross-workspace dashboards, audit evidence exports, consolidated flux, financial metrics, clean report exports, executive reports, AR/AP aging, and more.

entry.title: futuresearch
entry.content: Give Claude Code a research team. Forecast, score, classify, or research every row of a dataset.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,647 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: tdder
entry.content: Guides AI agents through disciplined coding practices. Language and build-system agnostic core with extensible language/build skills.

entry.title: claude-mnemonic
entry.content: Persistent memory system for Claude Code with SQLite, FTS5, and vector search

entry.title: pbrain
entry.content: Daily-ritual scaffolding for Obsidian — journal, gratitude, fitness, diet, plan-my-day, brainstorm, habits, reminders, monthly-review, weekly-review, organize clippings, and Codex CLI interop. All commands read/write into an Obsidian-synced vault.

entry.title: doc-wiki
entry.content: Documentation wiki generator and maintainer for Claude Code. Bootstrap, ingest, query, lint, refresh — all driven by the doc-wiki skill and 10 namespaced slash commands.

entry.title: adcp-client
entry.content: Adds the /adcp skill for calling AdCP advertising agent tools over MCP or A2A, running protocol compliance scenarios, and querying the AdCP registry. Includes built-in test agents for zero-config use. Backed by the `@adcp/sdk` npm package (formerly `@adcp/client`).

entry.title: contorium
entry.content: Contorium: AI Project Intelligence Layer — project cognition assets for Claude Code via MCP inspect and CLI derive.

entry.title: assumptions
entry.content: Assumption Archaeologist — surfaces load-bearing implicit assumptions baked into code ("always UTC", "already sorted", "user is authenticated here") into a living ASSUMPTIONS.md with stable IDs and a status lifecycle. Command-driven only; never runs automatically, so it never spends tokens unless you ask.

entry.title: agentbus
entry.content: Local message bus for AI agent sessions. Discover other running sessions on your machine and message them directly. SQLite bus, pluggable triggers, MCP channel delivery — no daemon, no network.

entry.title: small-cap-deepdive
entry.content: Use when researching neglected SMALL-CAP US equities for a given investment THEME or a single TICKER: enumerate the theme's small-cap universe from SEC filings (EDGAR full-text search UNIONed with a SIC reverse-recall floor), apply hard mechanical kill-flags (going-concern, death-spiral convertibles, ICFR material weakness, customer/government-program concentration) before any qualitative judgment, pull XBRL financials + Form 4 insider trades + shelf/dilution history, run a mechanical buy_eligible valuation gate (reverse-DCF / EV-EBITDA / NAV with V-shape value-trap vetoes), then run falsifiable deep-dive due diligence with forced disconfirmation and base-rate priors, and rank surviving candidates. A de-risk landmine-scanner, not a buy list; zero buys is a valid output. NOT for large-cap/sell-side coverage, factor/quant screening, trading signals, or execution.

entry.title: sodax-skills
entry.content: sodax-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: e2e-skills
entry.content: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/. Built for E2E test automation, flaky test root-cause analysis, false-positive detection, and test smell scanning.

entry.title: claudius
entry.content: Collection of specialized development agents and skills for Claude Code

entry.title: marketing-offers-tool
entry.content: SvelteKit tool for marketing teams to manage aggregator offers (Wolt, Bolt) and track offer performance.

entry.title: developer
entry.content: Build, integrate, and deploy applications on the Autonomi Network with verified guidance for the SDK, CLI, Direct Rust, and MCP paths.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram messaging for Claude Code through the agents-comm-bus daemon

entry.title: agents
entry.content: Skills, plugins, and config for AI coding agents

entry.title: tally-dev-tools
entry.content: Development tools and skills for the Tally project

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: nas-llm
entry.content: LLM Wiki Knowledge Base — planning, ops scripts, and E2E checklist for the DESKTOP-AT1P1UD deployment of nashsu/llm_wiki

entry.title: roborev
entry.content: Agent skills for roborev code review, fix, refine, and response workflows.

entry.title: numberlabs
entry.content: Author and validate numberlabs reconciliation configs locally with the openrecon CLI, then drive them against a live tenant through the Flow Service API MCP server.

entry.title: cman
entry.content: Agentic memory — search and summarize coding-agent sessions, plans, and memory across projects

entry.title: more-paper-workflow-pro-skill
entry.content: 中文/双语论文的证据闭环学术工作流：从定题、检索、下载、Zotero 到写作与引用审计，全程基于真实文献。

entry.title: workday-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Workday access for Claude — fetch your tasks, pay, benefits and compensation through your signed-in session

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: governed-second-brain
entry.content: A governed second brain for Claude Code — ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): turn your own files into cited (qmd://) memory, every write run through deterministic governance and a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit trail, in-process, no daemon, no network. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): query your team's single governed brain over the tailnet with a per-user token. Same /brain and /brain-save skills in both modes.

entry.title: sentio-ai-kit
entry.content: Skills for working with the Sentio platform — building blockchain data processors, running SQL queries, managing alerts, dashboards, and endpoints

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Personal development workflow for Claude Code: 8-step skill chain from ideation to shipping (ideate → product-plan → dev-plan → prototype → implement → qa → update-docs → ship), plus a task skill for small changes on shipped products, a next-step recommender, handoff, zoom-out, reusable subagents, and shared global rules.

entry.title: defect-scan
entry.content: Language-aware defect hunter: detect stack → triage → run real analyzers → reason with battle-tested patterns → report (confidence-tiered, tracker-correlated) → fix.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: harness-ops
entry.content: harness workflow automation

entry.title: mureo
entry.content: Your local-first AI ad ops crew for Google Ads, Meta Ads, Search Console & GA4. mureo sits on top of the official ad-platform MCPs, gates every change against your strategy, correlates outcomes locally, and keeps an auditable decision log — credentials never leave your machine.

entry.title: ryangannon-skills
entry.content: ryangannon-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: storm
entry.content: Convene a council of four engines (Claude + Codex + GLM + Gemini) on demand and synthesize one answer.

entry.title: heavyskill
entry.content: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entry.title: claude-toolkit
entry.content: Commands, agents, scripts, and hooks for Claude Code development workflows

entry.title: renata
entry.content: RENATA — a product method that ties persona → metric → ADR → code. Record · Evidence · Name · Anchor · Test · Automate.

entry.title: fabric-dw
entry.content: Agent skills for Fabric Data Warehouse: query performance analysis, warehouse-wide performance investigation and tuning, and dbt project bootstrap.

entry.title: druckenmiller
entry.content: Daily Druckenmiller conviction analysis. Fetches today's conviction score, 4-signal breakdown, and position recommendation from a live data pipeline.

entry.title: sr-obsidian

entry.title: slint
entry.content: Enhances Claude's ability to work with, debug, and build Slint GUI applications

entry.title: vibe-center-skills
entry.content: Vibe Coding Control Center - Custom skills for session management

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: yalla
entry.content: Autonomous coding pipeline for Claude Code with guided onboarding dashboard: minimum-diff -> onboard -> track -> plan -> work -> test -> review -> compound -> ship. Multi-agent planning, proof contracts, and binary review gates.

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entry.title: nuclear-grade
entry.content: Risk-graded context engineering for AI-assisted software work — a catalog of agent skills, paste-ready command prompts, and change-record templates that keep agent work questioned, controlled, and reviewable.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: craft
entry.content: Full-stack developer toolkit with integrated workflow automation - 115 commands (101 craft + 14 workflow), 8 agents, 39 skills with standardized dry-run preview mode (29 with --dry-run support). Code, git, site, docs, testing, architecture, CI, distribution, teaching workflows, planning, release pipeline, and ADHD-friendly features including brainstorming, task management, and spec capture

entry.title: nerdflair
entry.content: Nerd Font-powered statusline with configurable layout, color themes, progress bar flair, and audio chime notifications for Claude Code. Shows context usage, model, git branch, cost, and MCP servers.

entry.title: river-review
entry.content: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: acbc-skills
entry.content: acbc-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: clawbio
entry.content: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entry.title: jig
entry.content: Spec-driven, review-enforced, hook-gated AI-native development workflow for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-plugin-reference
entry.content: Claude Code plugin / skill / hooks の実機検証込みリファレンス

entry.title: jony
entry.content: Jony, a mobile-first UX design workflow: research → personas → IA → wireframes → copy → design system → Figma → Flutter

entry.title: unifable
entry.content: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: memcan
entry.content: Persistent memory for Claude Code — save and recall learnings, decisions, preferences across sessions.

entry.title: yule-agent-commands
entry.content: Yule 부서 에이전트의 슬래시 명령어 + 스킬 번들 (생성물). SSoT 는 agents/grants/slash-command-grants.json + 레지스트리 markdown.

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: awesome-agent-tools
entry.content: The hybrid marketplace for AI agent development: original skills, curated tools, and cross-platform support. Built for developers using AI agents.

entry.title: codey
entry.content: Live legibility for Claude Code: narrates what Claude is doing and warns when it's stuck.

entry.title: nexo-brain
entry.content: Local cognitive runtime for Claude Code — persistent memory, overnight learning, doctor diagnostics, personal scripts, recovery-aware jobs, startup preflight, and optional dashboard/power helper.

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: sogni-creative-agent
entry.content: Sogni Creative Agent: image, video, and music generation via Sogni AI's decentralized GPU network. Supports personas, persistent memories, style transfer, and multi-step creative workflows.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that installs a bash fragment script reading .forge/ and wires it into settings.json so your terminal statusline shows the current loop progress (active task·stage, goal-loop indicator, or backlog count); since Claude Code allows only one statusLine it auto-wraps your existing one as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: ultrapowers
entry.content: Autonomous, parallel, worktree-isolated execution of Superpowers plans via a committed Dynamic Workflow. Pairs with superpowers; invoke as /ultrapowers <plan-path> instead of subagent-driven-development.

entry.content: Hand off tasks to a cloud Devin session — VM, browser, shell, and full repo access. Create a session, get a URL, poll until done.

entry.title: eds-content-ops

entry.title: spark
entry.content: Spark repository development skills

entry.title: kerby
entry.content: kerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

entry.title: githits
entry.content: Code examples from global open source for developers and AI assistants

entry.title: frontend-visualqa

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Developer-environment skills for AI coding agents: install tools with mise, fall back to devenv.nix

entry.title: zs
entry.content: Agent-discipline skill framework: plans, fix-issues, draft-plan, run-plan, land-pr, and more.

entry.title: super-claudio

entry.content: AI job search command center — evaluate offers, generate CVs, scan portals, track applications

entry.title: mix

entry.title: forgekit
entry.content: Project-level workflow harness for Claude Code, Codex, and adjacent AI coding tools, with intent routing, report-only doc health and source trace checks, bounded loop policy, and opt-in native agent configuration templates.

entry.title: jahns-workflow
entry.content: SSOT-anchored agentic development workflow harness: one-click project setup, task registry with a global naming convention, zero-token roadmap rendering, round closeout, deterministic SHA-pinned review bundles + a ChatGPT reviewer kit, and external review ingestion.

entry.title: agency
entry.content: Harness-in-harness agency engine: code-mode capabilities (macroskills) over one provenance graph.

entry.title: capybaraa
entry.content: Calm senior-dev mode for Claude Code: one always-on mode that clarifies before code (curated ASCII questions and edge cases), stays lean, writes optimal code, spends tokens consciously, finishes terminally, and leaves the repo clean. A visible badge so you always know it is on.

entry.title: datasets
entry.content: Tilebox dataset skills for managing datasets, collections, datapoints, and schemas

entry.title: cbre-il-toolkit
entry.content: The CBRE Industrial & Logistics toolkit for Claude. Build polished, on-brand PowerPoint decks, turn a folder of property materials into an interactive longlist dashboard, draft I&L account briefings, map a company's warehouse and distribution network to an auditable Excel, and keep every word in the CBRE tone of voice.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 61 agents, 246 skills, 76 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: build-loop
entry.content: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; logging-tracer-bridge is an optional escalation hop to the standalone Coding Debugger supporting plugin for extended capability.

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: witty-diagnosis-agent
entry.content: An intelligent diagnostic agent for EulerOS system troubleshooting and analysis

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: autumn

entry.title: ai-brain-starter

entry.title: ics-calendar
entry.content: Read and write your Mac Calendar (including iCloud) directly from Claude, via Apple's native EventKit framework. No credentials required.

entry.title: gcd
entry.content: Knowledge skill for Google Cloud Dedicated (GCD) - sovereign cloud platform. Provides guidance on GCD-specific services, authentication, Terraform, and key differences from public Google Cloud.

entry.title: serve-sim

entry.title: shapeup-sdlc-plugin
entry.content: Shape Up SDLC harness for Claude Code: shaping, intake, orient, scope-mapping, building, evaluation and QA skills orchestrated by a tech-lead.

entry.title: basemind
entry.content: Full AI context layer over MCP — tree-sitter code-map, document RAG (PDF/Office/HTML/email + OCR + reranker), shared agent memory, on-demand web crawl, git history + blame + per-symbol diff. 300+ languages, 10+ coding-agent harnesses, content-addressed Fjall + LanceDB.

entry.title: t-tools
entry.content: DDD-driven development skills, sub-agents and workflow commands for Rust + React projects
